title: ICAI Announces Mock Test Papers Series I & II for CA Foundation September 2026 Exams
content:
# ICAI Announces Mock Test Papers Series I & II for CA Foundation September 2026 Exams

Ek important update hai. ICAI ne CA Foundation September 2026 Examination ke liye Mock Test Papers Series I aur II announce kiya hai. Yeh announcement June 29, 2026 ko kiya gaya hai, jo students ko unke upcoming exams ke liye prepare karne mein help karega.

*   **Mock Test Papers Series I:** This series is scheduled to start from August 18, 2026.
*   **Mock Test Papers Series II:** This series is scheduled to commence from August 29, 2026.
*   **Purpose:** These mock tests are crucial for students to assess their preparation levels, understand the exam pattern, and improve their time management skills before the actual examination.
*   **Announcement Date:** The announcement regarding these mock test papers was made on June 29, 2026.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icai.org/post.html?post_id=3056)

*Published on: 29 June 2026*
